{"credits": [{"type": "reporter", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/42600931?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/cyjhhh/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/cyjhhh/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/cyjhhh/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/cyjhhh/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/cyjhhh", "id": 42600931, "login": "cyjhhh", "node_id": "MDQ6VXNlcjQyNjAwOTMx", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/cyjhhh/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/cyjhhh/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/cyjhhh/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/cyjhhh/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/cyjhhh/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/cyjhhh", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-41392", "cvss": {"score": 7.3, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:L/AC:L/PR:L/UI:R/S:U/C:H/I:H/A:H"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 7.3, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:L/AC:L/PR:L/UI:R/S:U/C:H/I:H/A:H"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 6.3, "vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:N/AC:L/AT:P/PR:N/UI:N/VC:N/VI:L/VA:N/SC:N/SI:N/SA:N"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-184", "name": "Incomplete List of Disallowed Inputs"}], "description": "## Summary

Before OpenClaw 2026.3.31, exec allowlist matching could treat shell init-file wrapper invocations as if the approved script itself were being executed. Shell options such as `--rcfile`, `--init-file`, and `--startup-file` could therefore inherit allowlist trust from a matched script path even though the shell loaded attacker-chosen initialization first.

## Impact

This issue only applied when exec allowlist or allow-always behavior was enabled and the attacker could steer a shell-wrapper command shape that used init-file options. The result was a narrower allowlist bypass, not generic arbitrary command execution from an untrusted boundary.

## Affected Packages / Versions

- Package: `openclaw` (npm)
- Affected versions: `< 2026.3.31`
- Patched versions: `>= 2026.3.31`
- Latest published npm version: `2026.4.1`

## Fix Commit(s)

- `0c8375424620e12777ef24c162eedc7e9fcfd7e3` — reject shell init-file script matches

## Release Process Note

The fix shipped in OpenClaw `2026.3.31` on March 31, 2026. The current published npm release `2026.4.1` from April 1, 2026 also contains the fix.

Thanks @cyjhhh for reporting.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00118, "percentile": 0.01986}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-wpc6-37g7-8q4w", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-04-07T18:14:35Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-wpc6-37g7-8q4w", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-wpc6-37g7-8q4w"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-41392"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-04-28T19:37:42Z", "published_at": "2026-04-07T18:14:35Z", "references": ["https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/security/advisories/GHSA-wpc6-37g7-8q4w", "https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/commit/0c8375424620e12777ef24c162eedc7e9fcfd7e3", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-41392", "https://www.vulncheck.com/advisories/openclaw-exec-allowlist-bypass-via-shell-init-file-options", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-wpc6-37g7-8q4w"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/openclaw/openclaw/security-advisories/GHSA-wpc6-37g7-8q4w", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw", "summary": "OpenClaw: Shell init-file options could satisfy exec allowlist script matching", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-05-06T21:22:43Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-wpc6-37g7-8q4w", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "2026.3.31", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "openclaw"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 2026.3.31"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: OpenClaw: Shell init-file options could satisfy exec allowlist script matching
